name: status/claimed
description: Actively being worked. Owner: open a PR with Closes #NNN.

name: status/discussing
description: Under discussion. Maintainer: reach consensus then comment /approve.

name: status/hold
description: Intentionally paused. Do not claim. Read comments for reason.

name: status/queued
description: Ready to claim. Contributor: comment /claim to take this.

name: status/triage
description: Needs kind/ + area/ labels set. Maintainer: set them then comment /approve.

name: agent/blocked
description: Agent is stuck. Human: read the issue comment and unblock.

name: kind/bug
description: Broken behavior. Fix required. Verify with ujust verify after fix.

name: kind/documentation
description: Docs only. In common, push directly to main — no PR needed.

name: kind/enhancement
description: New capability. Spec must be written in issue body before claiming.

name: kind/epic
description: Multi-issue tracker. File child issues instead of implementing here.

name: kind/improvement
description: Incremental improvement. No new spec required.

name: kind/tech-debt
description: Cleanup or refactor. No user-visible change, no spec required.

name: kind/translation
description: i18n/l10n. Coordinate with translation team before claiming.

name: kind/wontfix
description: Will not be implemented. Do not claim or open PRs.

name: area/agent
description: Agent workflows, bonedigger, Hive integration, automation policies.

name: area/aurora
description: Affects Aurora (KDE). Notify Aurora maintainers before merging.

name: area/bling
description: MOTD, terminal styling, Charm/Gum tools.

name: area/bluespeed
description: AI/ML tooling and KubeStellar/Hive factory integration.

name: area/bootc
description: bootc image switching, rebasing, OCI transport.

name: area/brew
description: Homebrew taps, formulas, brew-managed packages.

name: area/buildstream
description: BuildStream pipeline, .bst elements, dakota build infrastructure.

name: area/ci
description: GitHub Actions workflows, pre-commit, linting, build automation.

name: area/dx
description: Developer experience: IDEs, devcontainers, toolbox, dev tooling.

name: area/finpilot
description: Finpilot AI assistant integration.

name: area/flatpak
description: Flatpak runtimes, apps, Flathub configuration.

name: area/gnome
description: GNOME Shell, extensions, dconf settings, desktop configuration.

name: area/hardware
description: Hardware drivers, firmware, device-specific support.

name: area/iso
description: Installation media: ISO build pipeline and installer integration.

name: area/just
description: Justfile recipes and user-facing just commands.

name: area/nvidia
description: NVIDIA driver, CUDA, GPU passthrough support.

name: area/policy
description: System policy files, default configs, polkit/sudo rules.

name: area/security
description: Security hardening, supply chain integrity, COPR vetting, secrets.

name: area/services
description: systemd units, system services, service configuration.

name: area/testing
description: Test infrastructure, QA pipelines, verification tooling.

name: area/ujust
description: ujust recipes, ujust report, user-facing diagnostic tooling.

name: area/upstream
description: Requires or tracks upstream patches or contributions.

name: hive/p0
description: Cycle release blocker. Fix before next promotion. Drop all other work.

name: hive/p1
description: Must land this cycle. Pick over all priority/ labels.

name: priority/p0
description: Repo-level blocker. Fix before other work.

name: priority/p1
description: High priority. Confirmed reproductions affecting 3+ users.

name: priority/p2
description: Normal backlog. Pick last when no hive/ or priority/p0-p1 exist.

name: agent-tested
description: e2e test suite passed. Set automatically by CI.

name: do-not-merge
description: Blocks all merges. Remove only when blocking issue resolves.

name: lgtm
description: Maintainer approved. Merges automatically when CI is green.

name: pr/needs-review
description: Awaiting human review. Add lgtm to approve or request changes.

name: tests:pass
description: Required CI gate passed. Enables auto-merge where wired. Set by automation.

name: size/L
description: ~3 days: 100–499 lines changed.

name: size/M
description: ~1 day: 30–99 lines changed.

name: size/S
description: ~half day: 10–29 lines changed.

name: size/XL
description: ~1 week: 500–999 lines changed.

name: size/XS
description: ~1 hour: 0–9 lines changed.

name: source:agent
description: Filed by an AI agent. Do not modify the issue body.

name: source:gha
description: Filed by GitHub Actions. Verify diagnostics before claiming.

name: source:manual
description: Filed by a human contributor.

name: source:ujust-report
description: Filed via ujust report. Contains device diagnostics.

name: flow/agent-donation
description: Donate agent time for a repo, issue, or PR review.

name: flow/issue-review
description: Agent: review this issue, post findings as a comment, remove this label.

name: flow/pr-review
description: Agent: review this PR, post findings as a comment, remove this label.

name: flow/project-report
description: Agent: produce a sourced project report, remove this label.

name: ai-context
description: ACMM audit finding. Agent context gap that improves reliability org-wide.

name: dependencies
description: Renovate dependency update. Automerges on CI pass; only major bumps need review.

name: needs-human/agent-oops
description: Agent error. Do not re-run automation. Fix manually then re-queue.

name: stale
description: No recent activity. Will auto-close unless updated.

name: stale-digest
description: Filed against an outdated image digest.

name: hardware/test-report
description: Community hardware test report. Triage to hardware/all-clear or hardware/blocker.

name: hardware/all-clear
description: Hardware test passed. Real-device evidence for promotion review.

name: hardware/blocker
description: Hardware regression. Blocks image promotion until resolved.
